title: Paper Products
description: Laboratory-grade filter papers, chromatography sheets, and indicator papers from leading manufacturers for analytical and preparative work.

subcategories.name: Qualitative Filter Papers
subcategories.description: General-purpose cellulose filter papers for routine gravity and vacuum filtration in qualitative analysis workflows.

subcategories.name: Quantitative Filter Papers
subcategories.description: Ashless and hardened filter papers for gravimetric analysis where minimal residue after ignition is critical.

subcategories.name: Specialty & Membrane Filters
subcategories.description: PTFE, nylon, glass fiber, and mixed cellulose ester membrane filters for HPLC sample prep, air monitoring, and microbiological analysis.

subcategories.name: Chromatography & Indicator Papers
subcategories.description: pH indicator strips, universal indicator papers, and chromatography sheets for quick chemical identification and separation.
